title: Bulk RNA sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5v050","text":"This protocol describes how to perform bulk RNA sequencing","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Total RNA was isolated from nuclei ( Nuclear Extraction from Tissue for FACS ), cell culture samples, or tissue using the RNeasy Mini Kit (Qiagen).
Libraries were generated using Illumina TruSeq Stranded mRNA library prep kit (poly-A selection) and sequenced on a NextSeq500 (PE 2×150bp).
creator: Raquel Garza
